name: Click in Place 4.5qt Slim Plastic Storage Bin for Home and Office Organization - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your accessories with the help of this Slim Bin from Brightroom™. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this green bin is transparent in hue, allowing you to see the stored items inside easily. Designed in a slim shape, this storage box comes with two side integrated handles for easy carrying, and it has a capacity of 4.5 quarts, offering ample space for storing a range of items.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
